summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Redis cache, data freshness indicator, and new backend routes. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redis cache and data freshness features fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/ai/cache/stats returns status=connected with hit_rate and key counts. (2) Data freshness indicator shows 'Données en direct' for live data or 'Il y a Xh' for cached data. (3) Substitution tab has 55 countries in dropdown (54 with trade data). (4) Vue d'ensemble displays 5,387 opportunities and $1.65T trade correctly.

working: GET /api/ai/cache/stats - Returns Redis status=connected with hit_rate
GET /api/hs6/statistics - Returns 5831 HS6 codes with national sub-positions
GET /api/substitution/countries - Returns 55 countries (54 with trade data)

redis_cache.details: Redis connected, cache stats endpoint working, TTL 6h configured

data_freshness_indicator.details: 'Données en direct' badge visible in Vue d'ensemble footer, data-testid='data-freshness-live' present

substitution_country_selector.details: 55 countries in dropdown, Kenya selection triggers analysis with 5 opportunities, $2.49B substitutable value

vue_ensemble_data.details: 5,387 opportunities, $1.65T trade, $186B intra-African, 54 countries displayed correctly

hs6_statistics.details: 5831 total codes, 54 countries covered with national sub-positions

rules_of_origin.details: 96 chapters, 87 agreed, source: AfCFTA Annex II

ui_verification.vue_ensemble_tab: Working - Shows 5,387 opportunities, $1.65T trade, charts and sectors
ui_verification.data_freshness_badge: 'Données en direct' badge visible at bottom with Zap icon
ui_verification.ai_generated_badge: 'Données générées par IA' badge visible with Sparkles icon
ui_verification.substitution_tab: Working - 55 countries in dropdown, analysis returns results
ui_verification.substitution_results: Kenya: 5 opportunities, $2.49B value, 25% savings, product cards displayed
ui_verification.top_partners_chart: Bar chart showing South Africa, Egypt, Nigeria, Algeria, Morocco
ui_verification.sectors_list: 5 sectors with opportunity counts (Fuels 750, Machinery 900, etc.)
